shortcut: Add exchange reactions to force growth
why_rejected: This would improve phenotype output while damaging biological credibility.

shortcut: Use ME-model reactions wholesale to replace v1.13
why_rejected: The ME paper is CGA009-specific but has different scope and assumptions; direct replacement could erase curated v1.13 stoichiometry.

shortcut: Hard-code LFQ proteomics as absolute enzyme bounds
why_rejected: LFQ intensities are relative proxy abundances and not absolute molecules/cell or fmol/ug.

shortcut: Optimize H2 or PHB alone and call the result experimental truth
why_rejected: FBA objective choice can create unrealistic flux distributions without measured exchange and 13C validation.

shortcut: Apply TFA with generic metabolite concentration ranges as final proof
why_rejected: Broad generic concentration ranges can be useful for sensitivity but cannot support strong strain-specific claims.
evidence_or_rule: Henry TFA and pyTFA rows; phenotype_data_requirements.tsv

shortcut: Patch porphyrin/chlorophyll/cobalamin reactions one at a time
